title: Gym Tonic — Strength & Balance Training
description: This class uses senior-friendly hydraulic machines to improve lower limb strength, posture and balance. Participants train in small groups with guided progression twice weekly to reduce frailty risk.
venueAddress: Blk 183 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #01-101, Singapore 650183

title: OTAGO Exercise Programme
description: OTAGO combines balance drills and targeted strength exercises that can be continued at home safely. Coaches reinforce correct movement patterns to reduce fall risk and build confidence in daily mobility.
venueAddress: Blk 183 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #01-101, Singapore 650183

title: Art Therapy Workshop
description: Seniors explore drawing, painting and mixed-media activities for emotional expression and stress relief. Guided reflection and group sharing support cognitive engagement and social connection.
venueAddress: Blk 183 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #01-101, Singapore 650183

title: GrandFun Activities — Games & Social
description: A lively social hour featuring traditional games, tabletop challenges and light team activities. Sessions are designed to promote laughter, conversation and sustained community participation.
venueAddress: Blk 183 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #01-101, Singapore 650183

title: Cooking Workshop — Healthy Eating
description: Participants prepare simple, heart-healthy dishes with practical portion and sodium-control tips. The workshop encourages better nutrition habits while building peer support around food.
venueAddress: Blk 183 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #01-101, Singapore 650183

title: Hari Raya Celebration 2026
description: Festive celebration with ketupat making, Malay cultural sharing and a traditional kueh buffet. Seniors and volunteers gather for performances and community fellowship.
venueAddress: Blk 183 Bukit Batok West Ave 8 #01-101, Singapore 650183

title: IM-Healthy Exercise Programme (HPB)
description: This HPB-partnered programme focuses on functional movements, endurance and safe strength work for older adults. Coaches monitor technique and intensity so seniors can train confidently.

title: Hip-Hop Dance for Seniors
description: Seniors learn simplified hip-hop routines with clear step breakdowns and upbeat music. The class improves coordination and stamina while encouraging joyful social participation.

title: Korean Dance Class
description: Participants enjoy K-pop inspired movements adapted to senior fitness levels and joint safety. Repeated choreography supports memory, rhythm and confidence in group performance.

title: Game Carnival — Board Games & Puzzles
description: This session features board games, strategy play and puzzle challenges that stimulate cognitive processing. Facilitators use team formats to build interaction and peer encouragement.

title: Befriending & Home Visit Service
description: Regular home visits and check-in calls support seniors who are homebound or socially isolated. Volunteers provide companionship, monitor wellbeing and link residents to needed services.

title: Hari Raya Aidilfitri Celebration
description: Hari Raya festivities include cultural performances, festive potluck sharing and gift hamper distribution. The event builds neighbourly support and celebration across communities.

title: Mindful Steps — Walking Exercise
description: Guided walking sessions combine light cardio with mindful breathing and posture awareness. Seniors build endurance at a steady pace while enjoying safe outdoor movement.

title: Cognitive Stimulation Therapy
description: Structured brain exercises and memory games are used to maintain mental sharpness and confidence. Facilitators adapt activities to different cognitive abilities and participation levels.

title: Befriending & Buddying Service
description: The service provides home visits and tele-befriending for seniors who need regular social contact. Staff and volunteers support emotional wellbeing and community connectedness.

title: Intergenerational Bonding Programme
description: Seniors and student volunteers co-create games, stories and collaborative projects in weekly sessions. Activities are designed to strengthen empathy, confidence and social participation.

title: Arts & Craft Wellness
description: Participants explore creative craftmaking as a form of relaxation and social interaction. The workshop supports self-expression, dexterity and a sense of achievement.

title: Hari Raya Open House 2026
description: A multi-cultural open house with Hari Raya snacks, Malay cultural quizzes and community performances. Residents celebrate together in an inclusive festive setting.
